value.reason: The cited page explicitly documents "Built-in Tracing" as a shipped feature of the OpenAI Agents SDK under the "Tracing" section. It confirms that tracing is enabled by default and records model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans — exactly as the cell description states. The Traces dashboard reference (platform.openai.com/traces) supports the claim about viewability for debugging, review, and compliance. The label "Built-in Tracing" is directly used in the page's comparison table ("Built-in tracing" row). The description faithfully reflects the page content without invented claims. This is clearly an audit logging/telemetry capability and is distinct from the adjacent capabilities listed (no confusion with code review, cost tracking, evals, checkpoint/rewind, or session forking).
